metadata.title: Privacy Policy
metadata.description: Privacy Policy for VibeCart - CNDP compliant data protection for Moroccan sellers

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introduction: At VibeCart, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal data in compliance with Moroccan Law 09-08 on the Protection of Personal Data (CNDP regulations).

cndp.title: CNDP Compliance Notice
cndp.description: VibeCart is committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with Law 09-08 and the regulations of the National Commission for the Control of Personal Data Protection (CNDP) in Morocco.

controller.title: 1. Data Controller
controller.text1: VibeCart SARL operates as the data controller for personal data processed through our platform. Our registered office is in Morocco.

dataCollected.title: 2. Personal Data We Collect
dataCollected.intro: We collect the following categories of personal data:

seller.title: For Sellers:
seller.bullet1: Identity: Full name, business name, shop handle
seller.bullet2: Contact: Phone number, email address, WhatsApp number
seller.bullet4: Content: Product videos, images, descriptions, and shop branding
seller.bullet5: Account: Login credentials, IP address, device information

customer.title: For Customers (via WhatsApp Orders):
customer.bullet1: Contact: Name, phone number, WhatsApp messages
customer.bullet2: Delivery: Shipping address, city, postal code
customer.bullet3: Order: Product selections, order history, preferences

usage.title: 3. How We Use Your Data
usage.intro: We process your personal data for the following purposes:
usage.bullet1: Providing and maintaining the VibeCart platform
usage.bullet2: Processing and managing orders between sellers and customers
usage.bullet3: Sending order notifications via WhatsApp Business API
usage.bullet5: Improving platform functionality and user experience
usage.bullet6: Complying with legal obligations and regulatory requirements
usage.bullet7: Preventing fraud and ensuring platform security

storage.title: 4. Data Storage and Security
storage.intro: We store your data securely using industry-standard practices:
storage.bullet1: Data is stored on Supabase infrastructure with encryption at rest and in transit
storage.bullet2: Servers are located in regions compliant with Moroccan data protection requirements
storage.bullet3: Access is restricted to authorized personnel only
storage.bullet4: Regular security audits and vulnerability assessments

whatsapp.title: 5. WhatsApp Business API Data Sharing
whatsapp.intro: VibeCart uses WhatsApp Business API to facilitate communication:
whatsapp.bullet1: Customer phone numbers are shared with WhatsApp for message delivery
whatsapp.bullet2: Order details are transmitted to generate order confirmation messages
whatsapp.bullet3: WhatsApp processes data according to their Privacy Policy
whatsapp.bullet4: Customers can opt-out of WhatsApp communications at any time
whatsapp.note: For more information, please review WhatsApp's Privacy Policy.

rights.title: 6. Your Data Protection Rights
rights.intro: Under Moroccan Law 09-08 and CNDP regulations, you have the following rights:
rights.bullet1: Right of Access: Request a copy of your personal data
rights.bullet2: Right of Rectification: Correct inaccurate or incomplete data
rights.bullet3: Right to Erasure: Request deletion of your personal data
rights.bullet4: Right to Restriction: Limit how we process your data
rights.bullet5: Right to Object: Object to certain types of processing
rights.bullet6: Right to Portability: Receive your data in a structured format
rights.exercise: To exercise your rights, contact us at: privacy@vibecart.ma or submit a request through your account settings.

retention.title: 7. Data Retention Policy
retention.intro: We retain your personal data for the following periods:
retention.bullet1: Account Data: Retained while your account is active; deleted within 30 days of account closure (unless legal obligations require longer retention)
retention.bullet2: Order Data: Retained for 10 years to comply with Moroccan tax and commercial law
retention.bullet3: WhatsApp Messages: Retained for 90 days, then automatically deleted

sharing.title: 8. Data Sharing and Third Parties
sharing.intro: We share your data only in the following circumstances:
sharing.bullet1: With Sellers/Customers: Necessary order information is shared to complete transactions
sharing.bullet2: Service Providers: Supabase (hosting), WhatsApp (messaging), and other essential service providers
sharing.bullet3: Legal Requirements: When required by Moroccan law or court orders
sharing.bullet4: Business Transfers: In case of merger, acquisition, or sale (with notice to users)
sharing.note: We do not sell your personal data to third parties for marketing purposes.

cookies.title: 9. Cookies and Tracking
cookies.text1: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience. For detailed information, please see our Cookie Policy.

transfers.title: 10. International Data Transfers
transfers.text1: While our primary operations are in Morocco, some data may be processed by service providers in other countries. We ensure adequate protection through standard contractual clauses and by selecting providers with strong data protection commitments.

complaints.title: 11. Filing a Complaint
complaints.text1: If you believe your data protection rights have been violated, you have the right to file a complaint with:
complaints.cndp: National Commission for the Control of Personal Data Protection (CNDP)
complaints.address: 5, Angle Allal El Fassi & Rue Arzez, Souissi, Rabat, Morocco

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.text1: For privacy-related inquiries or to exercise your data protection rights, please contact our Data Protection Officer:

metadata.title: Terms of Service
metadata.description: Terms of Service for VibeCart - Video-native e-commerce platform for Moroccan sellers

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.introduction: Welcome to VibeCart. These Terms of Service govern your use of our video-native e-commerce platform designed specifically for Moroccan sellers. By accessing or using VibeCart, you agree to be bound by these terms.

platform.title: 1. Platform Overview
platform.description: VibeCart is a video-native e-commerce platform that enables Moroccan sellers to showcase and sell their products through video content. Our platform integrates with WhatsApp Business API and Instagram to streamline the buying process.
platform.bullet1: The platform is specifically designed for sellers based in Morocco
platform.bullet2: All transactions are conducted in Moroccan Dirham (MAD)
platform.bullet3: Primary language support includes Moroccan Darija (ar-MA), Classical Arabic, French, and English

sellerResponsibilities.title: 2. Seller Responsibilities
sellerResponsibilities.intro: As a seller on VibeCart, you are solely responsible for:
sellerResponsibilities.bullet1: The accuracy of product descriptions, pricing, and availability
sellerResponsibilities.bullet2: The quality, safety, and legality of products offered for sale
sellerResponsibilities.bullet3: Order fulfillment, packaging, and shipping to customers
sellerResponsibilities.bullet4: Compliance with all applicable Moroccan laws and regulations
sellerResponsibilities.bullet5: Handling returns, refunds, and customer disputes

payment.title: 3. Cash on Delivery (COD) Payment Model
payment.intro: VibeCart primarily operates on a Cash on Delivery (COD) model:
payment.bullet1: Customers place orders through the platform and pay upon delivery
payment.bullet2: Sellers are responsible for setting clear delivery expectations
payment.bullet3: VibeCart does not process payments or hold funds on behalf of sellers
payment.bullet4: Any payment disputes must be resolved directly between seller and customer
payment.note: Note: Sellers should implement measures to minimize COD order cancellations and fake orders, as these directly impact business operations.

integration.title: 4. WhatsApp and Instagram Integration
integration.intro: VibeCart integrates with third-party services to enhance your selling experience:
integration.bullet1: WhatsApp Business API integration for order notifications and customer communication
integration.bullet2: Instagram integration for importing product content and expanding reach
integration.bullet3: You must comply with WhatsApp Business Terms and Instagram Terms of Use
integration.bullet4: VibeCart is not responsible for changes or disruptions to third-party services

content.title: 5. User-Generated Content
content.intro: By uploading content to VibeCart, you:
content.bullet1: Retain ownership of your original content
content.bullet2: Grant VibeCart a non-exclusive license to display and promote your content on the platform
content.bullet3: Confirm you have the right to use any music, images, or other media in your videos
content.bullet4: Agree not to upload content that infringes on third-party rights or violates Moroccan law

termination.title: 6. Account Termination
termination.intro: VibeCart reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts for:
termination.bullet1: Violation of these Terms of Service
termination.bullet4: Consistently poor customer feedback or high dispute rates
termination.notice: Where possible, we will provide notice before termination and an opportunity to address violations.

liability.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
liability.text1: VibeCart provides the platform "as is" and does not guarantee continuous, uninterrupted access. We are not liable for:
liability.bullet2: Product quality, safety, or delivery issues
liability.bullet4: Technical issues beyond our reasonable control

governingLaw.title: 8. Governing Law
governingLaw.text1: These Terms of Service are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Kingdom of Morocco. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Morocco.
governingLaw.text2: For sellers operating outside Morocco, you agree that your use of VibeCart constitutes acceptance of Moroccan jurisdiction for any platform-related matters.

changes.title: 9. Changes to Terms
changes.text1: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. We will notify users of significant changes via email or platform notifications. Continued use of VibeCart after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.text1: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at:

metadata.title: Cookie Policy
metadata.description: Cookie Policy for VibeCart - Understanding how we use cookies on our platform

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.introduction: This Cookie Policy explains how VibeCart uses cookies and similar technologies to recognize you when you visit our platform. It explains what these technologies are and why we use them, as well as your rights to control our use of them.

whatAre.title: 1. What Are Cookies?
whatAre.text1: Cookies are small data files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. They are widely used by website owners to make their websites work more efficiently and provide reporting information.
whatAre.text2: Cookies set by us are called "first-party cookies." Cookies set by parties other than us are called "third-party cookies." Third-party cookies enable third-party features or functionality on or through the website.

howWeUse.title: 2. How We Use Cookies
howWeUse.intro: We use cookies for several reasons:
howWeUse.bullet1: To enable certain functions of the platform
howWeUse.bullet2: To provide analytics and understand how you interact with our platform
howWeUse.bullet3: To store your preferences and settings
howWeUse.bullet4: To improve the security of our platform

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: These cookies are strictly necessary to provide you with services available through our platform and to use some of its features, such as access to secure areas. Without these cookies, certain services you have asked for cannot be provided.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our platform by collecting and reporting information anonymously. This helps us improve our platform and provide a better user experience.
analytics.note: Note: We currently use minimal analytics. If we implement third-party analytics (such as Google Analytics), we will update this policy and request your consent where required.

functionality.title: Functionality Cookies
functionality.description: These cookies allow us to remember choices you make when you use our platform, such as remembering your login details or language preference. They provide enhanced, more personal features.

thirdParty.title: 4. Third-Party Cookies
thirdParty.intro: In addition to our own cookies, we may use third-party cookies for:
thirdParty.bullet1: Supabase: For authentication and database services
thirdParty.bullet2: WhatsApp: For WhatsApp Business integration (if enabled)
thirdParty.bullet3: Payment processors: If/when online payment features are added
thirdParty.note: These third parties may use cookies, web beacons, and similar technologies to collect information about your use of our platform. We do not control these third parties' tracking technologies or how they may be used.

management.title: 5. How to Manage Cookies
management.intro: You have the right to decide whether to accept or reject cookies. You can exercise your cookie preferences in the following ways:

browser.title: Browser Settings
browser.text1: Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings. You can usually find these settings in the "Options" or "Preferences" menu of your browser.

consequences.title: Consequences of Disabling Cookies
consequences.text1: If you choose to reject cookies, you may still use our platform, but your access to some functionality and areas may be restricted. Specifically:
consequences.bullet1: You may not be able to log in or maintain a session
consequences.bullet2: Your language preferences may not be saved
consequences.bullet3: Some personalized features may not function properly

consent.title: 6. Cookie Consent
consent.text1: When you first visit our platform, we will ask for your consent to use non-essential cookies. You can change your preferences at any time by clicking the cookie settings link in the footer of our website.
consent.text2: Essential cookies (those necessary for the platform to function) are always active and cannot be disabled through our cookie preferences tool.

updates.title: 7. Updates to This Policy
updates.text1: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in the cookies we use or for other operational, legal, or regulatory reasons. We will notify you of any significant changes by posting the new policy on this page with an updated revision date.
updates.text2: We encourage you to periodically review this page for the latest information on our cookie practices.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.text1: If you have any questions about our use of cookies or other technologies, please contact us at:

dataDeletion.title: Data Deletion Instructions
dataDeletion.introduction: If you would like to delete your data from VibeCart, you can do so using any of the methods below. We will process your request within 30 days.

option1.title: Option 1: Delete from Instagram
option1.description: You can remove VibeCart's access to your data by revoking permissions directly from Instagram:
option1.step1: Open your Instagram app and go to Settings
option1.step2: Navigate to Security → Apps and Websites
option1.step3: Find VibeCart in the Active tab
option1.note: This will revoke our access to your Instagram data. Your VibeCart account and associated data will be automatically deleted within 30 days.

option2.title: Option 2: Contact Us
option2.description: Send an email to privacy@codelya.ma with the subject line "Data Deletion Request" and include:
option2.bullet2: The email address associated with your account (if any)

whatWeDelete.title: What Data We Delete
whatWeDelete.description: Upon receiving your request, we will permanently delete:
whatWeDelete.bullet1: Your seller profile and shop configuration
whatWeDelete.bullet2: Your product listings and uploaded images
whatWeDelete.bullet4: Your order history and customer interactions
whatWeDelete.bullet5: Any other personal data associated with your account
whatWeDelete.note: Some anonymized, aggregated data may be retained for analytics purposes, as permitted under applicable law.

processingTime.title: Processing Time
processingTime.description: Data deletion requests are processed within 30 days. You will receive a confirmation email once your data has been deleted.
